slack.detail: Sweep Suite documents Slack reader tools, but Slack MCP tools were not exposed in this Codex session.

open_items.title: DCC source recovery: confirm cloned repo, packet path, and live app boot
open_items.summary: DCC repo was missing during recent daily reviews and was cloned tonight. Verify the app boots, sees the 2026-05-13 packet, and no longer produces skeleton days.
open_items.notes: This closes the repeated review blocker called out in the 2026-05-12 retrospective.

open_items.title: Sweep Suite Slack reader exists, but Slack tools are not callable here
open_items.summary: The local read-slack skill names Slack MCP tools and expects Slack user/config state, but tool discovery returned no Slack tools and sweep-suite config/state are empty.
open_items.notes: Resolve before relying on automated Slack DMs/mentions in the daily packet.

open_items.title: Audit Angel has uncommitted slideshow/export changes to review
open_items.summary: Local git status shows modified public/index.html and public/js/export.js after the HTML slideshow export work.
open_items.notes: Do a quick QA pass, then either commit or intentionally park.

open_items.title: HYHH call tracker: protect browser-local data before more schema/UI changes
open_items.summary: Tuesday's recovery showed the call tracker browser database is production state. Any further IndexedDB changes should start with export/backup and blocked-upgrade handling.

notifications.title: Source scan for Wednesday packet
notifications.body: Calendar scanned successfully. Gmail scanned successfully, but connected mailbox produced no actionable Clever/work mail in focused searches. Slack was not callable from this Codex session despite local Sweep Suite documentation.

assessment.day_theme: Restore DCC as the working source of truth, then spend the cleanest focus blocks on active project follow-through.
must_do: Verify DCC repo/app boot and confirm this 2026-05-13 packet renders instead of a skeleton.
Resolve the Sweep Suite Slack path enough to know whether daily packets can read DMs/mentions automatically.
Review Audit Angel's uncommitted slideshow/export changes and decide commit vs. park.
Keep HYHH browser-local data protected before any more tracker schema or artifact-link work.
nice_to_do: Seed Sweep Suite user-context with known Slack user ID and the next reader configuration once connector access is clear.
Turn today's manual packet shape into a repeatable DCC packet routine.
risks: Without Slack access, the packet can miss DMs and mentions.
Gmail connector appears to be pointed at a mailbox with mostly newsletters, not work obligations.
DCC data can regress to skeleton days if the repo/app path is not kept materialized.

timeline.label: DCC morning review and source check
timeline.description: Open DCC, confirm Wednesday packet renders, note any skeleton/day-state issues, and make the first adjustment before starting project work.

timeline.label: Fix Sweep Suite Slack/DCC packet path
timeline.description: Find why read-slack MCP tools are documented but not callable here; seed missing config only after confirming the correct credential layer.

timeline.label: HYHH tracker follow-through with backup-first guardrails
timeline.description: Continue only after preserving/exporting browser-local call tracker state. Prioritize any remaining artifact-link or documentation-upload polish from Tuesday.

timeline.label: Lunch / admin buffer
timeline.description: Unscheduled buffer so the afternoon does not start already overdrawn.

timeline.label: Audit Angel slideshow/export QA
timeline.description: Review dirty changes in public/index.html and public/js/export.js, run the lightest useful verification, then commit or explicitly defer.

timeline.label: Sweep Suite reader preflight
timeline.description: Use the Phase 3 brief to confirm Calendar/Notion access, define the task-board DB input needed, and avoid wiring life/brain readers back into scope.

timeline.label: Inbox/manual Slack triage buffer
timeline.description: Because Slack is unavailable to Codex and Gmail found no work-mail obligations, use this slot for manual scan or quick replies if needed.

timeline.label: DCC closeout: preserve actuals and update next packet inputs
timeline.description: Before evening plans, mark what moved/done/blocked so tomorrow's review does not have to reconstruct the day from transcripts.

Fix Sweep Suite Slack/DCC packet path
HYHH tracker follow-through with backup-first guardrails

source_gaps: Slack connector not callable in this session
Work Gmail obligations not found in connected mailbox

skill_runs.notes: Calendar and Gmail connector scans completed. Slack scan blocked by missing callable tools.
